summary: Nice soundboard capture of a solid first set, highlighted by “I Know You Rider” and Brent’s shining keyboard work.
review: The SBD recording is clear and pleasant, delivering a mellow but well‑played first set that many fans rank among the stronger ’88 Capital Centre shows. Reviewers praise Brent Mydland’s keyboards and the vocal harmonies, with “I Know You Rider” singled out as a highlight, though some note the absence of the second set in this file.

ai_rating.rationale: Reviews are generally positive about performance and soundboard quality but mixed on overall excitement and missing second‑set audio, leading to a solid but not outstanding rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Listeners describe the SBD as “nice” and “very good”; no major clarity or mix issues are reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set is described as solid, mellow, and performed in high spirits; reviewers feel it’s a strong example of the ’88 Capital Centre shows.

band_member_comments.Keys: Brent shines on keyboards, receiving specific praise.
